landing.heroSubtitle: ILN is an open-source invoice factoring protocol on Stellar. Get paid today by selling your receivables to global liquidity providers at a fair discount.

steps.submitInvoiceDesc: Freelancers upload verified invoices with a set discount rate for immediate purchase.
steps.fundAsLPDesc: Liquidity Providers purchase invoices at the discounted rate using USDC on Stellar.
steps.protocolSettleDesc: When the payer settles the invoice, the full amount is distributed to the LP automatically.

landing.forFreelancersTitle: Get paid today, not in 90 days.
landing.forFreelancersSubtitle: This form is the on-chain entry point for freelancers in ILN. Connect Freighter, price the invoice, and publish it directly to the Soroban contract on Stellar testnet.

freelancerFeatures.instantLiquidityDesc: Sell invoices and get funds in minutes, not months.
freelancerFeatures.transparentPricingDesc: You set the discount rate you're comfortable with.
freelancerFeatures.globalMarketDesc: Access liquidity providers from around the world via Stellar.

landing.forLPsTitle: Earn real yield backed by real business.

lpFeatures.realWorldAssetsDesc: Diversify your crypto holdings into invoice factoring, a $3T global market.
lpFeatures.superiorYieldsDesc: Capture spreads far exceeding standard DeFi lending protocols.
lpFeatures.trustlessSettlementsDesc: Smart contracts handle the escrow and distribution on Stellar.

landing.lpHowItWorksDesc: When you fund an invoice, your USDC is held in a secure Soroban smart contract. The freelancer receives their funds (minus the discount) immediately. Once the payer settles the invoice, the full amount is released to you, including the discount as your earned yield.

footer.tagline: The decentralized standard for invoice liquidity. Built for the modern workforce.

submitForm.title: Submit a new invoice on Stellar testnet
submitForm.subtitle: Connect Freighter, enter the payer wallet, choose an approved token, and publish an invoice with an instant yield preview for you and liquidity providers.
submitForm.payerHint: Use the payer's public account address on Stellar testnet.
submitForm.loadingTokens: Loading approved tokens from the contract...
submitForm.tokensHint: Approved tokens are fetched dynamically from the ILN token registry.
submitForm.discountRateHint: The spread a liquidity provider earns when the payer settles in full.
submitForm.previewNote: Submission is limited to {{network}}. The selected token is sent on-chain using that token contract's decimals, and the payer must later settle with the same asset.
submitForm.noTokensAvailable: No approved tokens are currently available.
submitForm.reviewFormValues: Please review the form values and try again.

freelancer.pageSubtitle: Submit unpaid invoices to the ILN protocol and get paid early by liquidity providers — all on Stellar testnet.

submit.cardSubtitle: Fill in the details below. Your Freighter wallet will sign the transaction.
submit.connectFirstDesc: You need Freighter to submit invoices on Stellar testnet.
submit.successDesc: Your invoice ID is <id>#{{id}}</id>. Switch to "My Invoices" to track its status.
submit.discountHint: The discount an LP earns for early payment (e.g. 5 = 5%).

invoices.title: My Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Showing invoices submitted by your wallet. Auto-refreshes every 30 s.
invoices.connectToView: Connect your wallet to view invoices
invoices.connectDesc: Only invoices submitted from your address are shown.
invoices.noInvoicesFound: No invoices found for your address.

validation.payerRequired: Enter a valid Stellar address (56 characters).
validation.dueDateFuture: Due date must be in the future.
validation.discountRange: Enter a discount rate between 0 and 100.

lpDashboard.title: LP Dashboard
lpDashboard.subtitle: Browse and fund invoices to earn yield.

modal.fundSubtitle: The funding token is fixed by the invoice. Approve it only when the current allowance is too low, then complete funding.

step1Approve.title: Step 1: Approve {{token}}
step1Approve.approveExact: Approve exactly {{amount}} for the ILN contract.

step1Fund.title: Step 1: Fund Invoice
step1Fund.description: Send the invoice principal once the ILN contract can spend your {{token}}.

step2Fund.title: Step 2: Fund Invoice
step2Fund.description: Send the invoice principal once the ILN contract can spend your {{token}}.

modal.allowanceOk: Allowance already covers this invoice. You can go straight to funding.
